UpdateRateLimitRule.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
UpdateRateLimitRule.gatewayId: The ID of the IPv6 gateway
UpdateRateLimitRule.rateLimitRuleId: The ID of the rate limit rule
UpdateRateLimitRule.ingressBandwidthInMbps: Inbound bandwidth of the rate limit rule (Mbps)
UpdateRateLimitRule.egressBandwidthInMbps: Outbound bandwidth of the rate limit rule (Mbps)
